title: Man arrested after Sam Altman's house hit with Molotov cocktail, OpenAI headquarters threatened
summary: Police arrested a suspect at OpenAI's headquarters following allegations that he threatened arson and attacked CEO Sam Altman's home with a Molotov cocktail. The incident highlights security concerns for high-profile AI industry leaders.
content: Police arrested a suspect at OpenAI's headquarters for allegedly threatening arson after an attack on CEO Sam Altman's home.

zh.title: 男子在山姆·阿尔特曼住宅被汽油弹击中后被捕，OpenAI总部遭威胁
zh.summary: 警察在OpenAI总部逮捕了一名嫌疑人，他被指控威胁纵火并用汽油弹攻击了首席执行官山姆·阿尔特曼的住宅。该事件凸显了对高知名度AI行业领袖的安全隐患。

title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces fresh opposition after landing permit for Mississippi power plant
summary: Musk's xAI, now a SpaceX subsidiary, has obtained a permit for a large power plant in Mississippi but faces legal challenges from environmental organizations. The opposition highlights tensions between AI infrastructure expansion and environmental concerns.
content: Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX, faces a legal challenge from environmental groups opposed to a massive power plant in Mississippi.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的xAI在获得密西西比州电力厂许可证后面临新的反对
zh.summary: 马斯克的xAI现在是SpaceX的子公司，已获得密西西比州大型电力厂的许可证，但面临环保组织的法律挑战。这一反对凸显了人工智能基础设施扩张与环保关切之间的紧张关系。

title: Cramer warns of ‘incredibly overconfident’ market after U.S.-Iran ceasefire
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer warns that the market is "incredibly overconfident" following the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, expressing skepticism that Middle East tensions will be fully resolved. He cautions investors against overly optimistic positioning based on geopolitical developments.
content: "The idea that everything will finally go right in the Middle East seems like a real stretch to me," Cramer said.

zh.title: 克莱默警告美伊停火后市场"极度过度自信"
zh.summary: 美国消费者新闻与商业频道（CNBC）的吉姆·克莱默警告，美伊停火后市场"极度过度自信"，对中东局势会完全缓解持怀疑态度。他警告投资者不要因地缘政治发展而采取过度乐观的仓位。

title: Are you a ‘HENRY’? Why 90% of financial advisers will waive their minimums to get your business.
summary: Financial advisory firms' asset minimums are primarily marketing tools that advisers routinely waive for "HENRY" (high earner, not yet rich) clients seeking wealth management. Understanding how these thresholds actually work helps prospective clients determine if they're a good fit.
content: Most advisory firms’ $500,000 or $1 million thresholds are actually just branding tools. Here’s how to tell if you’re actually a good fit for their services.

zh.title: 你是"亨利"吗？为什么90%的财务顾问会放弃最低额度争取你的业务
zh.summary: 财务顾问公司的资产最低额度主要是营销工具，顾问们经常为寻求财富管理的"亨利"（高收入但还不富有）客户放弃这些限制。了解这些门槛如何实际运作可以帮助潜在客户确定他们是否是合适的人选。

title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
summary: Renderings reveal plans for a 250-foot "triumphal arch" over the Potomac as part of a proposed Trump administration project, which critics argue would create traffic congestion and obstruct historic views. Rep. Don Beyer characterized it as a taxpayer-funded vanity project.
content: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."

zh.title: 特朗普的250英尺"凯旋门"将高悬波多马克河，新渲染图显示
zh.summary: 渲染图显示了在波多马克河上建造250英尺"凯旋门"的计划，这是特朗普政府提议的项目，批评者辩称这会造成交通拥堵并妨碍历史景观。众议员唐·贝耶称其为纳税人资助的虚荣项目。

title: How chaotic do your fellow passengers need to be for an airline to give you compensation?
summary: Airlines have varying standards for what passenger misconduct warrants compensation for other travelers, with incidents ranging from aggressive behavior to spraying perfume. Affected passengers often need to escalate complaints to airline leadership to secure compensation.
content: One flier told MarketWatch that a fellow passenger sprayed them with perfume. She contacted the airline’s CEO.

zh.title: 乘客需要有多么混乱的行为，航空公司才会赔偿其他乘客？
zh.summary: 航空公司对乘客不当行为是否应该向其他乘客提供赔偿有不同的标准，这些行为包括从具有攻击性的行为到喷洒香水等。受影响的乘客通常需要向航空公司领导层提出申诉才能获得赔偿。

title: Vance, Bessent questioned tech giants on AI security before Anthropic's Mythos release
summary: Vice President Vance and Treasury Secretary Bessent separately questioned tech giants about AI security concerns ahead of Anthropic's Mythos release, while Fed Chair Jerome Powell met with major U.S. banks to address cybersecurity risks. The focus reflects growing government scrutiny of advanced AI systems.
content: Bessent and Fed Chair Jerome Powell separately met with the heads of the biggest U.S. banks to address the potential cyber threat of Anthropic's Mythos.

zh.title: 在Anthropic发布Mythos前，Vance和Bessent就AI安全问题质询科技巨头
zh.summary: 副总统Vance和财政部长Bessent在Anthropic发布Mythos之前分别就AI安全问题向科技巨头提出质询，同时美联储主席Jerome Powell与美国主要银行会面以应对网络安全风险。这一焦点反映了政府对先进AI系统日益增长的关注。

title: Software stocks are getting pulverized — but bitcoin’s rebound hints that a bottom might be in
summary: Software stocks continue to decline significantly, but bitcoin's strong Friday performance may signal a potential market bottom if historical relationships hold true. The bitcoin rebound could offer insight for investors in battered software equities.
content: Bitcoin’s relative strength on Friday may offer a bullish clue for battered software shares — that is, if a past relationship still holds.

zh.title: 软件股票正在大幅下跌——但比特币的反弹暗示底部可能已经到来
zh.summary: 软件股票继续大幅下跌，但比特币周五的强劲表现可能预示着如果历史关系继续保持，市场可能已经触底。比特币的反弹可能为饱受冲击的软件股票投资者提供启示。

title: Where fixed income investors are finding yield as geopolitical risk rattles markets
summary: As geopolitical tensions rattle markets, fixed income investors are finding yield by being selective about credit quality and managing bond duration strategically. Disciplined bond positioning is becoming increasingly important amid market volatility and uncertainty.
content: In the world of fixed income, being picky on credit quality and mindful of bond duration pays off.

zh.title: 地缘政治风险困扰市场，固定收益投资者在哪里寻找收益
zh.summary: 随着地缘政治紧张局势困扰市场，固定收益投资者通过选择性地关注信用质量和战略性地管理债券期限来寻找收益。在市场波动和不确定性中，有纪律的债券定位变得越来越重要。

title: Americans would love this $25,000 hybrid SUV — but it’s not available here yet
summary: A $25,000 Chinese hybrid SUV has received positive reviews and demonstrates competitive advantages that American automakers should take seriously, though it remains unavailable in the U.S. market. The vehicle highlights significant gaps between international and domestic automotive offerings.
content: Chinese vehicles may not be for sale in the U.S. yet, but they’re already getting positive reviews. “Other automakers should be paying attention,” said a vehicle-test editor at Edmunds.

zh.title: 美国人会喜欢这款2.5万美元的中国混动SUV——但它还未在这里上市
zh.summary: 一款2.5万美元的中国混动SUV获得了积极评价，展示了美国汽车制造商应该认真对待的竞争优势，尽管它仍未在美国市场上市。这款车突显了国际和国内汽车产品之间的重大差距。

title: Investors are gloomy about inflation and risk-taking ahead of Saturday’s Iran talks
summary: Investors are expressing pessimism about inflation and risk-taking as economic consequences of the Iran conflict become apparent, ahead of scheduled Saturday talks. Geopolitical uncertainty is affecting market sentiment and investment behavior across portfolios.
content: The economic toll of the Iran conflict is starting to show up at home.

zh.title: 在周六伊朗谈判前夕，投资者对通胀和风险承担持悲观态度
zh.summary: 投资者对通胀和风险承担表示悲观，因为伊朗冲突的经济后果变得明显，而周六计划举行谈判。地缘政治不确定性正在影响投资组合中的市场情绪和投资行为。

title: S&P 500 slips Friday, but index posts best week since November after fragile Iran ceasefire deal: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 declined slightly on Friday but recorded its best week since November, buoyed by optimism surrounding a fragile Iran ceasefire deal. The strong weekly performance despite Friday's dip reflects investor confidence in recent geopolitical developments. The index's resilience highlights how diplomatic breakthroughs can offset daily market volatility.
content: The S&P 500 fell slightly on Friday, though the index still had its best week since last November.

zh.title: 标普500周五小幅下跌，但在脆弱的伊朗停火协议后创造了11月以来最佳周表现：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数周五小幅下跌，但创造了11月以来最好的周表现，得益于围绕脆弱伊朗停火协议的乐观情绪。尽管周五有所下滑，但强劲的周表现反映了投资者对近期地缘政治发展的信心。该指数的韧性突显了外交突破如何能够抵消日常市场波动。

title: It’s OK to postpone saving for college until you have these 4 financial priorities under control
summary: Financial experts suggest that parents may want to prioritize other financial goals before aggressively saving for college, though the optimal timing may be counterintuitive. The article explores where college savings should fit within a comprehensive financial plan.
content: When should parents start saving for college? The answer may surprise you.

zh.title: 在控制这4项财务优先事项之前推迟大学储蓄是可以的
zh.summary: 财务专家建议，父母可能希望在积极储蓄大学教育之前优先考虑其他财务目标，尽管最优时机可能出人意料。该文章探讨了大学储蓄在全面财务计划中的位置。

title: Jeffrey Epstein victims will get House committee hearing, James Comer says
summary: Rep. James Comer has promised a House committee hearing for Jeffrey Epstein victims, following first lady Melania Trump's call for Congress to provide victims with a public platform to share their experiences. The hearing aims to provide accountability and justice.
content: Rep. James Comer's promise came a day after first lady Melania Trump urged Congress to give victims of Jeffrey Epstein a public hearing so "we have the truth."

zh.title: 詹姆斯·科默宣布杰弗里·爱泼斯坦受害者将获得众议院委员会听证会
zh.summary: 众议院议员詹姆斯·科默承诺为杰弗里·爱泼斯坦受害者举行众议院委员会听证会，此前第一夫人梅拉尼亚·特朗普呼吁国会为受害者提供公众平台分享他们的经历。该听证会旨在提供问责和正义。

title: Here’s the real cost of economy airfare after all the fees. ‘What’s next — an add-on for access to the bathroom?’
summary: Airlines now generate over $100 billion annually from add-on fees, making the true cost of economy airfare significantly higher than advertised base fares. The proliferation of fees continues to expand to increasingly basic services.
content: Airlines are now making over $100 billion a year from add-on fees.

title: Average tax refund is 11% higher, latest IRS filing data shows
summary: The average tax refund this season is about 11% higher compared to the same period in 2025, according to the latest IRS filing data. This increase suggests more taxpayers are receiving larger returns this year.
content: The average tax refund is about 11% higher so far this season, compared with about the same period in 2025, according to IRS filing data.

zh.title: 最新美国国税局申报数据显示平均税收退款增加11%
zh.summary: 根据最新的美国国税局申报数据，本季度的平均税收退款比2025年同期高约11%。这一增长表明更多纳税人今年获得了更大的退款。

title: Earnings season could finally give the stock market some good news. Here's what's ahead
summary: With strong earnings forecasts providing confidence in corporate resilience, investors are optimistic the stock market could gain significant momentum during earnings season. A quick resolution to current geopolitical tensions could further support market gains.
content: Given a strong earnings backdrop, investors have been optimistic that companies can weather an energy shock — so long as there is a quick resolution to the war.

zh.title: 财报季终于有望给股市带来好消息。以下是即将发生的情况
zh.summary: 由于强劲的盈利预期增强了市场对企业复原力的信心，投资者乐观地认为股市在财报季期间可能会获得显著动力。当前地缘政治局势的快速解决可能会进一步支撑市场涨幅。

title: CoreWeave stock pops 11% on deal to power Anthropic's Claude
summary: CoreWeave's stock surged 11% following a deal to provide computing infrastructure for Anthropic's Claude AI model. The agreement highlights surging demand for cloud computing capacity as AI development accelerates.
content: The deal comes one day after Meta committed an additional $21 billion in spending to the cloud provider as AI demand continues to soar.

zh.title: CoreWeave股价因与Anthropic达成Claude协议而上涨11%
zh.summary: CoreWeave股价在达成为Anthropic的Claude AI模型提供计算基础设施的协议后上涨了11%。该协议凸显了随着AI开发加速，对云计算容量的需求激增。

title: Social Security 2027 cost-of-living adjustment estimate rises with gas prices
summary: Rising inflation, driven partly by elevated gas prices, has increased estimates for the 2027 Social Security cost-of-living adjustment. The adjustment helps senior citizens maintain purchasing power as consumer prices rise.
content: New government data shows the pace of inflation has increased, pushing up one estimate for the Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027.

zh.title: 社保2027年生活成本调整估计随油价上升而增加
zh.summary: 由于部分由高油价推高的通胀上升，2027年社保生活成本调整的估计增加了。该调整帮助老年人随着消费者价格上升而保持购买力。

title: Airlines are raising checked bag fees. Here's how to avoid paying with credit cards
summary: Airlines are raising checked baggage fees, but travelers can circumvent these costs through co-branded airline credit cards and other strategies. Consumers have multiple options to reduce travel expenses.
content: Airlines are raising checked bag fees, but you have options to avoid the cost — like a co-branded airline credit card.

zh.title: 航空公司提高行李托运费。以下是如何避免用信用卡支付的方法
zh.summary: 航空公司正在提高行李托运费，但旅客可以通过联名航空公司信用卡和其他策略来规避这些费用。消费者有多种选择来减少旅行开支。

title: Great at gaming? US air traffic control wants you to apply
summary: The U.S. government is launching an advertising campaign targeting video gamers to recruit for air traffic control positions. The initiative seeks to leverage gaming skills for critical aviation safety roles.
content: A new government ad campaign is trying to persuade gamers to apply for air safety roles.

title: Tankers urged not to pay toll to Iran for use of strait
summary: Tanker companies are being advised not to pay tolls to Iran for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz amid regional tensions. The dispute reflects broader geopolitical instability affecting global shipping.
content: Tanker firms are being advised not to pay Iran any levies in return for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 油轮被敦促不要向伊朗支付海峡使用费
zh.summary: 油轮公司被建议不要向伊朗支付过往霍尔木兹海峡的通行费，以应对地区紧张局势。这一争端反映了影响全球航运的更广泛的地缘政治不稳定。

title: We're raising our price targets for 4 stocks and cutting them for 2 others
summary: The Investing Club has adjusted its price targets for six stocks, raising targets for four while cutting them for two. The daily analysis provides investors with actionable recommendations ahead of market close.

title: Trump praises Palantir with stock down 15% this week as Iran conflict drags on
summary: Trump praised Palantir despite the company's stock falling 15% this week amid ongoing Iran conflict tensions. The endorsement highlights how political statements can move markets during geopolitical uncertainty.
content: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普赞扬Palantir，股价本周下跌15%，伊朗冲突持续拖累

title: There are years-long waiting lists to retire on college campuses. 6 steps to take before enrolling.

content: The warning came after a flurry of unusual activity on oil and stock futures markets shortly before President Trump said he would pause attacks on Iran.

zh.title: 白宫警告员工勿在预测市场上押注伊朗战争
zh.summary: 在特朗普宣布暂停攻击前出现可疑交易活动后，白宫警告员工不要在预测市场上对伊朗冲突结果下注。

title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
summary: Michael Burry, known for 'The Big Short,' maintains short positions on Palantir through long-dated put options despite Trump's recent praise lifting the stock, signaling skepticism about valuation.
content: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.

zh.title: 迈克尔·伯里表示在特朗普推文推高股价后仍做空Palantir
zh.summary: 以《大空头》闻名的迈克尔·伯里尽管特朗普最近的好评推高了股价，但仍通过长期看跌期权对Palantir保持空头头寸，表示对其估值的怀疑。

title: Intel’s stock hasn’t been this hot in 38 years. It now has a ‘renewed lease on life.’
summary: Intel's stock has reached its highest level in 38 years, benefiting from surging CPU demand and growing partnerships, though analysts caution the company still faces significant challenges.
content: Intel stands to benefit from a CPU boom and a growing array of partnerships, but an analyst notes it’s “not out of the woods yet.”

zh.title: 英特尔股票38年来最火热，获得"重获新生"
zh.summary: 英特尔股票达到38年来的最高水平，受益于CPU需求的激增和日益增多的合作伙伴关系，尽管分析师警告该公司仍面临重大挑战。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Palantir, Marvell, CoreWeave, Zscaler & more
summary: Multiple stocks including Palantir, Marvell, CoreWeave, and Zscaler experienced significant price movements during midday trading, making headlines among active traders.
content: Here are the names making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 股票中盘最大涨跌幅：Palantir、Marvell、CoreWeave、Zscaler等
zh.summary: 包括Palantir、Marvell、CoreWeave和Zscaler在内的多只股票在中盘交易中经历了显著的价格波动，在活跃交易者中成为头条新闻。

title: 'Social Security scam' searches surge — why identity protection matters now
summary: Increased searches for 'Social Security scam' highlight growing identity theft threats, underscoring the importance of identity protection services for consumers concerned about fraud.
content: With an identity protection service, you'll be alerted right away when something is wrong.

zh.title: "社会保障诈骗"搜索激增——为什么身份保护现在很重要
zh.summary: "社会保障诈骗"搜索的增加突显了日益增长的身份盗窃威胁，强调了身份保护服务对担心欺诈的消费者的重要性。

title: ‘Tip of the inflation iceberg’: Social Security’s COLA forecast rises to 3.2%
summary: Social Security's Cost of Living Adjustment forecast has risen to 3.2% following a surge in consumer prices during March, partially driven by escalating tensions with Iran.
content: Consumer prices surged in March, thanks to the conflict with Iran.

zh.title: "通胀冰山的一角"：社会保障生活成本调整预测上升至3.2%
zh.summary: 社会保障生活成本调整预测在3月消费者价格飙升后上升至3.2%，部分由与伊朗关系恶化推动。

title: Powell, Bessent discussed Anthropic's Mythos AI cyber threat with major U.S. banks
summary: Anthropic has distributed its new Mythos AI model to select companies while federal officials discuss cybersecurity risks with major U.S. banks. Concerns exist that the model's capabilities could be exploited by malicious actors.
content: Anthropic rolled out the new Mythos AI model to a select group of companies over concerns that hackers could exploit its capabilities.

zh.title: 鲍威尔、贝森特与美国主要银行讨论Anthropic的Mythos AI网络威胁
zh.summary: Anthropic已将其新的Mythos AI模型分发给选定的公司，联邦官员同时与美国主要银行讨论网络安全风险。存在模型的功能可能被恶意行为者利用的担忧。

title: Soaring pump prices drive US inflation to highest level in almost two years
summary: U.S. inflation has reached 3.3%, the highest level in nearly two years, driven primarily by surging gasoline prices linked to the Iran war. Energy costs remain the primary driver of broader price increases for consumers.
content: A surge in prices at the pump due to the Iran war has pushed the inflation rate to 3.3%.

zh.title: 飙升的油价推动美国通胀达到近两年来的最高水平
zh.summary: 美国通胀率已达到3.3%，这是近两年来的最高水平，主要由与伊朗战争相关的汽油价格飙升驱动。能源成本仍然是消费者更广泛价格上升的主要驱动力。

title: Ireland gridlocked by fuel protests as Iran war drives prices higher
summary: Ireland is experiencing fuel protests and traffic gridlock as citizens react to rising fuel prices stemming from the Iran conflict. Public frustration centers on the government's response to escalating energy costs.
content: Protestors are taking issue with the government's response to the spike in fuel prices since the onset of the Iran war.

zh.title: 伊朗战争推高油价，爱尔兰被燃料抗议活动陷入瘫痪
zh.summary: 由于伊朗冲突导致燃料价格上涨，爱尔兰正在经历燃料抗议活动和交通瘫痪。公众的不满情绪集中在政府对能源成本上升的应对措施上。

title: What's at stake ahead of crucial U.S.-Iran peace talks as leaders meet in Pakistan
summary: Crucial U.S.-Iran peace talks are underway in Pakistan while Iran accuses Israel of ceasefire violations and Israeli forces continue operations against Hezbollah in Lebanon. The negotiations could significantly impact regional stability and conflict resolution.
content: Already, Tehran has accused Israel of violating the terms of the ceasefire, as the IDF continues to attack Hezbollah in Lebanon.

zh.title: 领导人在巴基斯坦会晤前关键美伊和平谈判的利害攸关
zh.summary: 美伊和平谈判在巴基斯坦进行中，伊朗指责以色列违反停火协议，以色列军队继续在黎巴嫩对真主党进行军事行动。谈判可能对地区稳定和冲突解决产生重大影响。

title: Here's the inflation breakdown for March 2026 — in one chart
summary: The Iran war has contributed to rising prices in gasoline, airline fares, and other consumer goods reflected in March 2026 inflation data. The breakdown illustrates energy's outsized impact on overall consumer price inflation.
content: The Iran war has pushed up gasoline, airline fares and other prices for consumers.

zh.title: 2026年3月通胀数据一览——能源影响突出
zh.summary: 伊朗战争导致汽油、航空票价和其他消费品价格上升，反映在2026年3月的通胀数据中。该数据显示能源对整体消费者价格通胀的巨大影响。

title: Consumer sentiment hits record low, inflation fears rise amid Iran war
summary: Consumer sentiment has reached an all-time low with the headline index falling to 47.6, representing a sharp 10.7% decline from March amid elevated inflation concerns. The deterioration reflects heightened economic anxiety related to geopolitical tensions and price pressures.
content: The university's headline index of consumer sentiment tumbled to 47.6, down 10.7% from March to its lowest on record.

zh.title: 伊朗战争中消费者情绪创历史新低，通胀担忧上升
zh.summary: 消费者情绪创历史新低，主要指数跌至47.6，环比3月份下降10.7%，通胀担忧加剧。这一恶化反映了与地缘政治紧张局势和价格压力相关的经济焦虑加剧。

title: EU fingerprint and photo travel rules come into force
summary: The EU's long-delayed Entry/Exit System has come into effect, requiring fingerprint and photo collection from travelers to 29 EU countries. The new biometric requirements significantly alter travel procedures for UK passengers and other visitors to the Schengen area. The system represents a major shift in EU border security protocols.
content: The EU's much-delayed Entry/Exit System will change the way UK passengers travel to 29 countries.

zh.title: 欧盟指纹和照片旅行规则正式生效
zh.summary: 欧盟迟到已久的入境/出境系统已生效，要求前往29个欧盟国家的旅客进行指纹和照片采集。新的生物识别要求大大改变了英国乘客和其他申根地区访客的旅行程序。该系统代表了欧盟边境安全协议的重大转变。

title: Dolce & Gabbana co-founder steps down as chair
summary: Dolce & Gabbana's co-founder stepped down as chair as the luxury fashion house struggles with mounting debt amid a global slowdown in luxury consumer spending.
content: The bold and sensual fashion house has been struggling with debt amidst a slowdown in global luxury spending.

zh.title: 杜嘉班纳联合创始人辞去董事长职位
zh.summary: 奢侈品集团杜嘉班纳的联合创始人辞去了董事长职位，该公司在全球奢侈品消费放缓的背景下负债不断增加。

title: Iran attacks on crucial Saudi pipeline and production facilities slash kingdom's oil output
summary: Iran's attacks on Saudi Arabia's critical oil infrastructure have significantly reduced the kingdom's output, compounding existing disruptions to global oil supplies from attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. This threatens energy security and could pressure global markets.
content: The damage to Saudi infrastructure will only compound the disruption to global oil supplies trigged by Iran's attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 伊朗对沙特关键石油管道和生产设施的攻击削减了王国的石油产量
zh.summary: 伊朗对沙特阿拉伯关键石油基础设施的攻击大幅降低了该王国的产量，加剧了霍尔木兹海峡油轮袭击造成的全球石油供应中断。这威胁到能源安全，可能对全球市场造成压力。

title: Bessent, Powell warned bank CEOs about Anthropic model risks: Reuters
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell met with bank CEOs to warn of cybersecurity risks posed by Anthropic's AI models. The warning reflects growing concerns about AI security implications for the financial system.
content: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve ⁠Chair Jerome Powell convened an meeting with bank CEOs to warn ​of cyber risks posed ​by Anthropic's ​AI.

zh.title: 贝森特、鲍威尔向银行首席执行官警告Anthropic模型风险：路透社
zh.summary: 财政部长斯科特·贝森特和美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔与银行首席执行官会面，警告Anthropic人工智能模型带来的网络安全风险。这一警告反映了人们对人工智能对金融系统安全影响的日益担忧。

title: Brent oil faces its worst weekly drop since 2022, as weekend talks loom between U.S. and Iran
summary: Brent crude oil has fallen to its worst weekly performance since 2022 as U.S.-Iran cease-fire negotiations loom, though continued Israeli attacks on Lebanon threaten to derail the agreement. The outcome of weekend talks could significantly impact oil prices.
content: A U.S. delegation is set for talks with Iran on Saturday as part of the cease-fire. But Israel has continued to attack Lebanon, endangering the agreement.

zh.title: 随着美伊周末谈判迫在眉睫，布伦特油价面临自2022年来最糟糕的周度下跌
zh.summary: 随着美伊停火谈判迫在眉睫，布伦特原油跌至自2022年以来最糟糕的周度表现，尽管以色列对黎巴嫩的持续攻击威胁可能破坏协议。周末谈判的结果可能对油价产生重大影响。

title: AI will boost productivity. But first it will drag the economy down.
summary: While AI promises long-term productivity gains, the implementation period will cause short-term economic drag as companies undergo disruptive transformations. Even efficient firms will face months of adjustment as they adopt AI technologies.
content: Companies and investors can expect a painful monthslong transformation that makes even the most efficient firms look like slackers.

zh.title: 人工智能将提高生产力。但首先它会拖累经济。
zh.summary: 虽然人工智能承诺长期生产力提升，但实施期间将给经济带来短期下滑，因为公司经历颠覆性转变。即使是高效的企业也将面临数月的调整期，以采用人工智能技术。

title: UBS downgrades ServiceNow, saying AI is a bigger threat than first believed
summary: UBS has downgraded ServiceNow, citing greater vulnerability to AI-driven disruption than previously estimated. The downgrade reflects concerns that AI could pose a larger threat to the company's business model.
content: ServiceNow may be more vulnerable to disruption risks posed by AI than some analysts on the Street think, according to UBS.

zh.title: 瑞银下调ServiceNow评级，称AI威胁比预期更大
zh.summary: 瑞银下调了ServiceNow的评级，理由是该公司对AI驱动的破坏性影响的脆弱性比之前估计的要大。此次下调反映出人们担忧AI可能对该公司业务模式构成更大威胁。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Lumentum, ServiceNow, Sandisk & more
summary: Several stocks including Lumentum, ServiceNow, and SanDisk are experiencing significant premarket trading activity. The moves suggest investor focus on semiconductor and enterprise software sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Lumentum、ServiceNow、SanDisk等
zh.summary: 包括Lumentum、ServiceNow和SanDisk在内的多只股票在盘前交易中出现显著波动。这些波动表明投资者关注半导体和企业软件领域。

title: Stefano Gabbana has stepped down as Dolce & Gabbana chairman but will keep a creative role
summary: Stefano Gabbana has stepped down as chairman of Dolce & Gabbana but remains in a creative capacity at the Italian fashion house he co-founded. The leadership transition maintains his influence while expanding governance responsibilities.
content: Stefano Gabbana has stepped down as chairman of the Italian fashion house that he co-founded with Domenico Dolce, but will continue in his creative role.

zh.title: 斯特凡诺·加巴纳已从杜嘉班纳主席职位卸任，但将保留创意角色
zh.summary: 斯特凡诺·加巴纳已从杜嘉班纳主席职位卸任，但在这个他共同创立的意大利时尚品牌中继续担任创意职务。这次领导权的过渡维持了他的影响力，同时扩展了管理责任。

title: My second husband will leave me $540,000 if I bequeath him my $130,000 net worth. What will happen to my two sons?
summary: A personal finance column explores estate planning implications of a second marriage where spouses plan different inheritances for their respective families. The analysis considers how to protect assets for adult children in blended family situations.
content: “I doubt he would pass anything on to them.”

zh.title: 如果我将13万美元净资产留给第二任丈夫，他将给我54万美元。我的两个儿子会怎样？
zh.summary: 一篇个人理财专栏探讨了第二次婚姻中的遗产规划影响，在这种情况下配偶为各自的家庭计划不同的继承方案。分析考虑了如何在混合家庭情况下保护成年子女的资产。

title: Wall Street’s fear gauge just flashed an unusual signal that could carry the S&P 500 to 7,400 within months
summary: The VIX's recent decline signals that the stock market bottom may be in, with Fundstrat's Tom Lee citing this as the third major indicator of recovery. If confirmed, the S&P 500 could rally to 7,400 within months.
content: The falling VIX is a third sign that the bottom for stocks is in says Fundstrat’s Tom Lee

zh.title: 华尔街的恐惧指数刚刚闪现出一个不寻常的信号，可能在数月内将标普500指数推至7,400点
zh.summary: VIX最近的下跌表明股市底部可能已经出现，Fundstrat的汤姆·李将其列为第三个主要的复苏指标。如果确认，标普500指数可能在数月内反弹至7,400点。

title: China's Xi invokes 'threat' of Taiwan independence in first cross-strait opposition talks in a decade
summary: Xi Jinping met with Taiwan's opposition leader in Beijing—the first such talks in a decade—where he invoked Taiwan independence as a threat to regional stability. The meeting precedes Trump's expected May meeting with Xi and Taiwan's 2028 presidential election.
content: Xi Jinping hosted Taiwan's main opposition leader in Beijing for the first time in a decade, ahead of a high-stakes meeting with Trump in May and Taiwan's presidential election in 2028.

zh.title: 中国习近平在十年来首次两岸反对派会谈中提出台湾独立的"威胁"
zh.summary: 习近平在北京会见了台湾反对派领导人，这是十年来首次此类会谈。他将台湾独立称为对地区稳定的威胁。这次会议先于特朗普预期的5月与习近平会面以及台湾2028年总统选举。

title: Nike shares are still not cheap after 30% drawdown this year, says Piper Sandler
summary: Despite a 30% decline this year, Nike shares are not attractive at current valuations, according to Piper Sandler. The analyst cites growing competition in athleisure and waning demand for sports-focused loungewear as structural headwinds.
content: Nike could struggle with sales as the athleisure market becomes more crowded and demand for sports-focused loungewear moves past its peak, per Piper Sandler.

zh.title: 派珀桑德勒表示，耐克股票在今年下跌30%后仍然不便宜
zh.summary: 尽管今年下跌了30%，但据派珀桑德勒称，耐克股票在当前估值下没有吸引力。该分析师指出，运动休闲领域竞争加剧和运动休闲服装需求下降是结构性逆风。

title: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
summary: BlackRock is applying hedge fund strategies to exchange-traded funds through its liquid alternative ETF products, led by Jeffrey Rosenberg. The approach combines traditional hedge fund long-short strategies with the accessibility and lower costs of ETFs.
content: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.

zh.title: 贝莱德借鉴对冲基金策略，将其应用于交易所交易基金
zh.summary: 贝莱德通过由杰弗里·罗森伯格领导的流动性替代ETF产品，将对冲基金策略应用于交易所交易基金。这种方法将传统对冲基金的多空策略与ETF的可访问性和较低成本相结合。

title: The Tech Download: Reputational damage, supply chain issues and local investment. What's next for Middle East tech?
summary: A two-week U.S.-Iran ceasefire offers hope for regional stability, but the Middle East tech sector faces ongoing challenges from reputational damage, supply chain disruptions, and local investment concerns. The temporary truce provides a window for industry recovery.
content: A two-week ceasefire was agreed between the U.S. and Iran on Wednesday, prompting hopes of the beginnings of the end of the conflict.

zh.title: 科技下载：声誉损害、供应链问题和本地投资。中东科技的下一步是什么？
zh.summary: 两周的美伊停火为地区稳定提供了希望，但中东科技部门面临来自声誉损害、供应链中断和本地投资关切的持续挑战。这个临时停火为业界复苏提供了窗口。

title: Will UK petrol and diesel prices start going down?
summary: UK petrol and diesel prices have risen due to Middle East tensions stemming from the US-Israel conflict with Iran, but a ceasefire agreement could reverse the trend. The fragile nature of the truce means fuel prices may remain volatile as geopolitical developments unfold. Consumers are watching closely for signs of price relief.
content: UK petrol prices have risen because of the US-Israel war with Iran but the ceasefire could see prices drop.

zh.title: 英国汽油和柴油价格会开始下降吗?
zh.summary: 由于美国-以色列与伊朗冲突引发的中东局势紧张,英国汽油和柴油价格上升,但停火协议可能会逆转这一趋势。休战协议的脆弱性意味着随着地缘政治局势的发展,燃油价格可能保持波动。消费者正在密切关注价格下跌的迹象。

title: How many ships are crossing the Strait of Hormuz?
summary: BBC Verify analysis shows minimal shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz since the U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal was announced. The low vessel count reflects continued caution and risk assessments despite the diplomatic agreement.
content: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

zh.title: 有多少艘船正在通过霍尔木兹海峡？
zh.summary: BBC Verify分析显示，自美伊停火协议宣布以来，通过霍尔木兹海峡的航运流量最少。低船舶数量反映了尽管有外交协议，但持续的谨慎和风险评估。

title: TSMC reports forecast-beating revenue as AI chip demand defies geopolitical tensions
summary: TSMC's first-quarter revenue exceeded forecasts, demonstrating robust demand for AI chips despite geopolitical tensions. The strong results reassure investors about sustained demand for high-end semiconductor computing capacity.
content: Sterling sales figures for the first three months will provide much-need reassurance to investors that demand for high-end chips for use in AI compute is still robust.

zh.title: 台积电报告超预期收入，人工智能芯片需求抵消地缘政治紧张局势
zh.summary: 台积电第一季度收入超过预期，尽管面临地缘政治紧张局势，仍然显示出对人工智能芯片的强劲需求。强劲的结果让投资者放心，对高端半导体计算能力的需求将持续。

title: This coat cost $248 in illegal tariffs. Will he ever get the money back?
summary: Importers are eligible for refunds on illegally collected tariffs, but the process is complex and not all tariff payers will recover their money, creating uncertainty for affected parties.
content: Importers are in line for tariff refunds. But whether everyone who paid the for the tariffs will get money back is a trickier question.

zh.title: 这件外套含有248美元的非法关税。他能拿回这笔钱吗？
zh.summary: 进口商有资格对非法征收的关税获得退款，但该流程复杂且并非所有关税支付者都能获得赔偿，这给受影响的各方带来了不确定性。

title: Eli Lilly market share drops, Novo Nordisk holds firm as generic weight-loss drugs flood India
summary: Eli Lilly loses market share in India's GLP-1 weight-loss drug market as cheap generic semaglutide drugs proliferate, while Novo Nordisk maintains its position following aggressive price cuts on Ozempic and Wegovy.
content: Eli Lilly loses share in India’s GLP‑1 market as cheap semaglutide generics surge, while Novo holds steady after deep price cuts to defend Ozempic, Wegovy.

zh.title: 随着仿制减肥药充斥印度市场，礼来公司市场份额下降，诺和诺德保持稳定
zh.summary: 在廉价仿制司美格鲁肽药物激增的背景下，礼来公司在印度GLP-1减肥药市场的市场份额下降，而诺和诺德在对Ozempic和Wegovy进行激进降价后保持了其市场地位。

title: What this real-world oil price says about the level of stress in the energy market
summary: Energy analysts warn that an Iran ceasefire is unlikely to alleviate acute stress in global oil markets, suggesting underlying supply-demand imbalances persist despite diplomatic progress.
content: Energy analysts warn that the Iran ceasefire is not likely to alleviate acute signs of stress in the physical oil market.

zh.title: 这个真实油价所反映的能源市场压力
zh.summary: 能源分析师警告说，伊朗停火不太可能缓解全球石油市场的严重压力，表明尽管外交有所进展，但潜在的供需失衡仍然存在。

title: How families can get crisis support to heat homes
summary: A new crisis fund will support community groups assisting people struggling to afford heating their homes, addressing growing energy affordability challenges.
content: A crisis fund is going to support community groups who help people struggling to heat their homes.

zh.title: 家庭如何获得供暖危机救助
zh.summary: 一项新的危机基金将支持社区组织协助那些难以负担家庭供暖费用的人，以解决日益增长的能源可负担性问题。

title: Furniture poverty on the rise, charity says
summary: A UK charity warns that furniture donations are declining while demand from those in poverty continues to rise, creating hardship for those unable to afford home furnishings.
content: The Harrogate-based charity warns donations of furniture are falling while demand continues to grow.

zh.title: 家具贫困加剧，慈善机构表示
zh.summary: 一家英国慈善机构警告称，家具捐赠在减少，而贫困人群的需求在上升，这给那些无法承担家具的人造成了困难。

title: Oil edges higher as U.S.-Iran ceasefire fails to boost traffic via Strait of Hormuz
summary: Oil prices rose as a U.S.-Iran ceasefire failed to increase shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump warned Iran against imposing transit tolls on tankers.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美伊停火未能增加霍尔木兹海峡通行量，油价小幅上涨
zh.summary: 由于美伊停火协议未能增加通过霍尔木兹海峡的海运流量，油价上升。特朗普警告伊朗不要对油轮征收过境费。

title: The Trump administration is getting angry as EU Big Tech fines top $7 billion in 2 years
summary: The Trump administration is increasingly clashing with the European Commission over its enforcement actions against U.S. tech companies, which have accumulated over $7 billion in fines.
content: The European Commission and Trump administration are increasingly clashing over the bloc's actions against U.S. tech companies.

zh.title: 欧盟科技巨头罚款突破70亿美元，特朗普政府感到愤怒
zh.summary: 特朗普政府与欧盟委员会在对美国科技公司的执法行动上日益产生冲突，这些罚款已累计超过70亿美元。

title: Investors are questioning gold’s role in portfolios, says Morgan Stanley — but another metal is set to outperform
summary: Morgan Stanley reports that investors are reconsidering gold's utility as a portfolio hedge amid volatile commodity prices, while alternative metals are positioned to outperform.
content: Gold's conventional role as a portfolio risk management tool has been brought into question over a dramatic five-week period for commodity prices

zh.title: 摩根士丹利表示投资者质疑黄金在投资组合中的作用，但另一种金属将表现更好
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利报告称，在大宗商品价格波动的背景下，投资者正在重新考虑黄金作为投资组合对冲工具的效用，而替代金属有望表现更优。

title: Shoppers feel crunch as price of produce climbs
summary: Middle East conflicts are driving up UK produce prices, with consumers facing higher costs for key vegetables including tomatoes, cucumbers, and peppers.
content: The conflict in the Middle East is impacting the price of tomatoes, cucumbers and peppers in the UK.

zh.title: 购物者承受蔬菜价格上涨的压力
zh.summary: 中东冲突正在推高英国蔬菜价格，消费者面临番茄、黄瓜和辣椒等关键蔬菜成本上升。

title: Anthropic weighs building its own AI chips: Reuters
summary: Anthropic is exploring designing its own AI chips as major AI companies face chronic shortages of computing hardware critical to their operations and development.
content: Anthropic is exploring the possibility of designing its own chips, three sources said, as the company and its rivals respond to a chronic shortage of AI chips.

zh.title: Anthropic考虑自主设计AI芯片
zh.summary: Anthropic正在探索自主设计AI芯片，因为主要AI公司面临对其运营和开发至关重要的计算硬件长期短缺。

title: China factory prices return to growth after 3 years, beating expectations on surging oil prices
summary: China's factory prices returned to growth for the first time in three years, driven by rising oil prices, though strategic reserves help mitigate inflationary pressures.
content: China faces possible inflationary spillovers, though its massive strategic stockpiling onshore and diversified sources of energy provided some cushion.

zh.title: 中国工厂价格在3年后恢复增长，石油价格飙升超出预期
zh.summary: 中国工厂价格在三年来首次恢复增长，由上升的石油价格驱动，尽管战略储备有助于缓解通胀压力。

title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair confirmation plan hits snag as nomination hearing is delayed
summary: Kevin Warsh's confirmation hearing as Federal Reserve chair has been delayed after Senator Thom Tillis raised concerns related to an ongoing investigation of current chair Jerome Powell.
content: President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current chair Jerome Powell.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什美联储主席提名计划受挫，听证会延期
zh.summary: 在参议员托姆·蒂利斯对现任美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查提出担忧后，凯文·沃什的美联储主席确认听证会被延期。

title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
summary: The White House has directed staff not to place bets on prediction markets, which have grown in popularity for wagering on geopolitical events and conflicts.
content: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.

zh.title: 白宫指示员工不要在预测市场上下注
zh.summary: 白宫已指示工作人员不要在预测市场上下注，这些市场因地缘政治事件和冲突赌博而日益受欢迎。

title: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
summary: Alibaba is leading a $290 million investment in startup Shengshu to develop a "general world model," representing a new AI approach as large language model limitations emerge.
content: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.

zh.title: 随着大语言模型局限性显现，阿里巴巴领投2.9亿美元开发新型AI模型
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴领导对初创公司盛数的2.9亿美元投资，用于开发"通用世界模型"，代表了一种新的人工智能方法，因为大型语言模型的局限性正在显现。

title: Fast Retailing shares soar to record high after the Uniqlo owner lifts profit forecast
summary: Fast Retailing, parent company of Uniqlo, saw shares surge 9% to a record high after raising its full-year profit guidance.
content: Shares of Fast Retailing surged over 9% to a record high on Friday after the Japanese parent of Uniqlo lifted its full-year outlook.

zh.title: 迅销集团股价创历史新高，优衣库母公司上调利润预期
zh.summary: 优衣库母公司迅销集团股价暴涨9%至创纪录高位，此前该公司上调了全年利润预期。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open mostly higher as a fragile Iran-U.S. ceasefire keeps investors on edge
summary: Asia-Pacific markets rose amid a fragile Iran-U.S. ceasefire, though oil prices remained elevated. West Texas Intermediate crude gained 0.62% to $98.48 per barrel, while Brent crude closed at $95.92 per barrel. The mixed sentiment reflects investor uncertainty about the ceasefire's durability.
content: The West Texas Intermediate was up 0.62% at $98.48 per barrel as of 7:50 p.m. ET. Brent crude ended the session at $95.92 per barrel.

zh.title: 亚太市场多数上涨，脆弱的伊朗-美国停火协议令投资者如坐针毡
zh.summary: 在脆弱的伊朗-美国停火协议下，亚太市场上升，但油价仍居高不下。西德州中质原油上涨0.62%至每桶98.48美元，布伦特原油收于每桶95.92美元。混合的市场情绪反映了投资者对停火协议持久性的不确定性。

title: OpenAI slams Anthropic in memo to shareholders as its leading AI rival gains momentum
summary: OpenAI criticized competitor Anthropic in a shareholder memo, claiming it operates at a disadvantage compared to OpenAI. The memo reflects growing competitive tension between the two leading AI companies. Anthropic's momentum appears to concern OpenAI enough to publicly address investor concerns.
content: OpenAI sent a memo to investors blasting chief rival Anthropic for "operating on a meaningfully smaller curve."

zh.title: OpenAI在致股东备忘录中抨击Anthropic，其主要AI竞争对手正在获得动力
zh.summary: OpenAI在致股东的备忘录中批评了竞争对手Anthropic，声称它与OpenAI相比处于不利地位。该备忘录反映了两大AI公司之间日益加剧的竞争紧张局势。Anthropic的势头似乎足以让OpenAI担忧，以至于公开解决投资者的顾虑。

title: ‘I worked very hard’: I’m 71 and have $6 million after scrimping and saving. My son, 33, wants money for a house. Do I say yes?
summary: A 71-year-old with $6 million in savings faces a request from their 33-year-old son for money toward a house purchase. The son is married with one child and another on the way. The dilemma highlights common family financial tensions between generations.
content: “My son is 33 years old, married, with an 18-month-old baby and another baby due in September.”

zh.title: "我工作非常努力"：我71岁，通过节俭和储蓄获得了600万美元。我的33岁儿子想要买房的钱。我应该同意吗？
zh.summary: 一位拥有600万美元储蓄的71岁老人面临来自33岁儿子的购房资金请求。这位儿子已婚，有一个孩子，还有一个即将出生的孩子。这个困境突出了代际之间常见的家庭财务紧张关系。
